title.rendered: Personality Development Classes In Ranchi ~ Kalam Academy

content.rendered:
Advanced Personality Development Classes in Ranchi

- First Time In Ranchi
- 45 Days Training + 45 Days Paid Internship
- Practical Offline Training

  • 5 Weeks Course
  • Internship & Placement Option
  • Offline Classes
  • Project Based Learning
  • Live training
  • Learn From Expert
Call Now

Apply For FREE Counselling

Kalam Academy Ranchi is on the list of 100 promising startups recognized by Google

Student's Review

Course Structure

Placement Partner

F.A.Q

Who are Eligible for this Training Program

  • MBA/BBA Student
  • B.COM / M. COM
  • MBA/ BBA Passout Student
  • Anyone willing to make carrier in Business Development / Sales / Marketing 

What You Will Learn In Advanced Personality Development Course in Ranchi

Week 1 {Learn Business Process}

How a business works

Major Business Operation

Business case studies

Week 2 {English Tonality & Public Speacking}

Corporate English Learning, Corporate Vocabulary, Tonality Management

Week 3 {Communication Skills & Confidence Building}

Office communication, Technical and Nontechnical Communication

Week 4 {Interview Preparation & Resume Building}

Why HR Rejects You, How To make resume, How to impress your HR,

Week 5 {Leadership Skills}

Leadership skill, How To Develop It, Optional Paid Internship.

Bonus {Business Computing}

Ms Word, Ms Excel, PPT, Cloud Computing, Email Writing.

Placement Partner {Advanced Personality Development Training Program in Ranchi}

We Love Them

Students Review

 5/5
I am feeling blessed to be a student at Kalam Academy. I have learnt digital marketing from A to Z. When I took admission here, I was like a child in digital world. But it seems me like I and digital marketing made for each other. Thanks KA.
Ajay Kandulana
Ex-Student
My hearty thanks to KA. Sir is very appreciating. He taught every student very deeply. I took admission in KA with lots of confusion in my mind for digital marketing concept. But now I feel myself a confident talented student of digital marketing.
Amit Kumar Singh
Digital Marketer
First of all thank you KA for an appreciating effort specially for girls. I was unable to pay fee but KA assisted me with 50% scholarship. Whatever I learnt here is worthwhile. I used to think that digital marketing is something 4 metro cities. But now I learnt digital marketing in a small city like Ranchi only because of KA. Now I am a blogger. Tons of thanks KA
Nishat Firdaush
Ex-Student

Simplified PHP Developer Internship with Kalam Academy
